# Tasks Checklist Template

## Overall status

- [ ] Spec reviewed
- [ ] Technical decisions confirmed
- [ ] Initial traceability created
- [ ] Delivery baseline confirmed
- [ ] Placeholder impact made explicit

## Design

- [ ] Domain identified
- [ ] Use cases identified
- [ ] Entry points defined
- [ ] Driven adapters defined
- [ ] Exposure decision justified (REST endpoint / Tool / Resource / Prompt)
- [ ] Output policy defined
- [ ] Auth / error / resilience policy defined

## Scaffold

- [ ] Models generated or confirmed
- [ ] Use cases generated or confirmed
- [ ] Entry point generated or confirmed
- [ ] Adapters generated or confirmed
- [ ] Scaffold placeholders identified for replacement
- [ ] Scaffold placeholders intentionally retained were identified and isolated from the business critical path
- [ ] Critical configuration keys identified

## Implementation

- [ ] Business logic implemented
- [ ] Validations implemented
- [ ] Error handling implemented
- [ ] Output formatting implemented
- [ ] Configuration updated
- [ ] Authorization per capability defined
- [ ] Use case wiring confirmed
- [ ] Placeholder replacement or isolation completed
- [ ] Resilience and audit aligned with the initiative

## Validation

- [ ] Use case tests
- [ ] Adapter tests
- [ ] Entry point / exposed capability tests
- [ ] Wiring tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Architecture review
- [ ] Traceability status updated to implemented / verified as appropriate
- [ ] Final documentation updated
